prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily log returns for SPGI over the last 1 year(s) ending on 2024-02-14 were analyzed to estimate the daily drift (mean log return) and volatility (standard deviation of log returns). These parameters were then extrapolated 15 trading days (approximately 21 calendar days) into the future. The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution, and the confidence intervals are derived from the standard deviation of this distribution, assuming the current price of $441.88 as the starting point.
